questions: Why does total DNA loss route to bootstrap, and where is the classification decided?
Where can a backup-on-write trigger live given both big SKILL.md files are at the 40KB budget ceiling?
Does governance-state-loss fit the closed shadow-event enum?

findings.summary: _is_initialized is binary current-existence; _classify_missing routes total loss to UNINITIALIZED/bootstrap; no git-history or backup consultation
zero backup/snapshot infrastructure; .agent/local-backup is net-new; .gitignore must gain it
snapshot trigger must be a first-write-of-session hook in gate_chain.write_gate_artifact (fail-open); skill prose impossible within 31/70-byte headroom
governance-state-loss absent from shadow_event enum; additive amendment to a registered schema is freeze-lint-safe
session identity + git-history evidence + existing health-gate tests are reusable; no test covers previously-initialized-now-missing
